constraints.name: warnManyVersions
constraints.messageTemplate: Entity has {count} versions - consider archiving old versions

constraints.name: validStatus
constraints.message: Status must be pending, approved, or rejected

constraints.name: warnPendingTooLong
constraints.messageTemplate: Approval pending for {days} days - may need follow-up

constraints.name: warnLock
constraints.messageTemplate: Locking entity '{name}' - edits will be blocked

value.value: Cannot update name while entity is locked

constraints.name: warnRestoreOldVersion
constraints.messageTemplate: Restoring to old version #{version} - current changes may be lost

value.value: New version number must be positive

policies.name: VersionManagement
policies.message: Admins and managers can manage version control

policies.name: VersionRestore
policies.message: Only admins and managers can restore previous versions

policies.name: VersionApprove
policies.message: Admins, managers, and leads can approve versions
